label: Recent Fills
description: Latest order fills with instrument, side, quantity, price, and fill status. Updates in real time.

l0.notes: 0.1 WidgetErrorBoundary: PASS (global in widget-wrapper.tsx). 0.2 requiredEntitlements: PASS ([execution-basic, execution-full]). 0.3 availableOn: PASS ([overview]). 0.4 No any/@ts-ignore: FIXED — removed redundant 'as unknown' intermediate cast; replaced with direct narrowing from unknown via Array.isArray guard and typed cast. 0.5 No lib/mocks/ imports: PASS. 0.6 Loading state: PASS (ordersLoading Spinner was already present). 0.7 Empty state: PASS ('No recent fills' message was already present). 0.8 Error state: PASS (global WidgetErrorBoundary). 0.9 Dead code: PASS (none found).

1.3.note: orders endpoint not org — scoped; shows all fills for authenticated user

l1.notes: 1.1 Data via hook: PASS — reads ordersData/ordersLoading exclusively via useOverviewDataSafe(). 1.2 Context reads useGlobalScope: PASS — use-overview-page-data.ts calls useGlobalScope(). 1.3 Org filter: N/A for orders — orders API returns fills for the authenticated user; org filter applies via strategyPerformance scope but orders endpoint is not org-scoped in the current API layer. Documented as known limitation. 1.4 Client filter: N/A — same reason; orders endpoint is not client-scoped. Documented as known limitation. 1.5 Strategy filter: N/A — orders are not strategy-filtered at context level. Documented as known limitation. 1.6 Empty scope = all data: PASS — no scope filtering applied means full orders dataset returned. 1.7 Reference data location: PASS — no fixture constants embedded in widget.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

knownIssues: Orders data is not filtered by org/client/strategy scope — the useOrders() hook does not accept scope parameters. Widget shows all fills for the authenticated user regardless of scope selection. Future work: wire scope into useOrders() or filter ordersData in context.
findings: L0.4 had redundant 'as unknown' intermediate cast (ordersData is already typed unknown in context). Fixed by removing the intermediate variable and using Array.isArray guard directly on ordersData.
